title: Digital Marketing Bootcamp
subtitle: Master modern marketing to grow brands and businesses in the digital age
description: Comprehensive 5-week intensive course covering all aspects of modern digital marketing: SEO, content marketing, social media strategy, email marketing, paid advertising, analytics, and brand building. Hands-on projects and real-world case studies prepare you for marketing roles or freelance success.
targetAudience: Career changers entering marketing, business owners seeking to market their ventures, marketing professionals upgrading their digital skills, entrepreneurs, and ambitious individuals wanting to master digital growth strategies
objectives: Develop and execute comprehensive digital marketing strategies across multiple channels
Analyze marketing data and metrics to optimize campaigns and improve ROI
Create compelling content and campaigns that drive engagement and conversions
Design integrated marketing funnels from awareness through customer loyalty
Build and manage personal or business brands effectively in digital space
prerequisites: Basic understanding of internet and digital platforms
Familiarity with social media (as a user)
Access to Google Analytics, Gmail, and free marketing tools
Analytical mindset and comfort with numbers/metrics
Commitment to hands-on projects and real-world application

modules.title: Marketing Fundamentals and Strategy
modules.description: Understand the modern marketing landscape, develop strategic thinking, and build the foundation for integrated digital campaigns.
objectives: Analyze market opportunities and customer segments
Develop data-driven marketing strategies aligned with business goals
Design customer journey maps across multiple touchpoints
Create comprehensive marketing plans with clear KPIs

lessons.title: The Modern Marketing Landscape
lessons.description: Understand how digital transformation has changed marketing forever, from channels to customer expectations.
objectives: Understand current digital marketing trends

lessons.title: Customer Research and Personas
lessons.description: Learn to deeply understand your audience through research, creating buyer personas that guide all marketing.
objectives: Create detailed customer personas

lessons.title: Marketing Strategy Framework and Planning
lessons.description: Build strategic marketing plans using frameworks like SOSTAC, ensuring alignment with business objectives.
objectives: Develop comprehensive marketing strategies

lessons.title: Customer Journey and Touchpoint Mapping
lessons.description: Map complete customer journeys and identify optimal marketing touchpoints at each stage.
objectives: Design customer journey maps

lessons.title: Module 1 Project: Marketing Plan for a Real or Hypothetical Business
lessons.description: Create a complete marketing strategy document with research, strategy, and implementation plan.
objectives: Execute complete marketing planning

quiz.question: What is the primary advantage of developing detailed buyer personas?
options: Personas are required by law for marketing
Personas help you understand and target your ideal customers more effectively across all channels
Personas eliminate the need for market research
Personas only matter for social media marketing
quiz.explanation: Well-developed personas guide all marketing decisions—from messaging and channel selection to content creation—ensuring relevance and efficiency.

quiz.question: In the customer journey, what is the 'awareness' stage?
options: When customers make a purchase decision
When customers first become aware of your brand or problem you solve
When customers are loyal to your brand
After customers have purchased multiple times
quiz.explanation: The awareness stage is the top of the funnel where prospective customers first learn about your brand or recognize they have a problem.

quiz.question: What does KPI stand for, and why are KPIs important in marketing?
options: Key Performance Indicator; they show which marketing is popular
Key Performance Indicator; they measure progress toward specific goals and inform optimization decisions
Key Product Information; they describe your offerings
Key Price Information; they set pricing strategy
quiz.explanation: KPIs are measurable values showing how effectively marketing achieves business objectives. They guide decisions about what to continue, modify, or stop.

modules.title: Content Marketing and SEO Mastery
modules.description: Master the art and science of creating content that ranks, engages, and converts while optimizing for search engines.
objectives: Develop content strategies aligned with customer needs and search intent
Create SEO-optimized content that ranks in search engines
Implement technical SEO and on-page optimization
Build content calendars and establish publishing workflows

lessons.title: Content Strategy: From Planning to Publishing
lessons.description: Learn to develop content strategies that attract your audience and achieve business goals.
objectives: Build data-driven content strategies

lessons.title: SEO Fundamentals: How Search Engines Work
lessons.description: Understand search algorithms, ranking factors, and the fundamentals of optimizing for search visibility.
objectives: Understand SEO principles and mechanisms

lessons.title: Keyword Research and On-Page Optimization
lessons.description: Master keyword research tools and optimize your pages to rank for high-value search terms.
objectives: Conduct keyword research and optimize pages

lessons.title: Technical SEO and Link Building Strategies
lessons.description: Implement technical SEO best practices and develop ethical link-building strategies.
objectives: Implement technical SEO improvements

lessons.title: Module 2 Project: SEO-Optimized Content Plan
lessons.description: Create a content calendar and produce SEO-optimized articles that target valuable keywords.
objectives: Produce optimized content at scale

quiz.question: What is search intent, and why is it crucial for SEO content?
options: The number of people searching for a keyword
The actual need or goal behind a search query (informational, commercial, navigational)
The amount you bid on a keyword in advertising
The language used in your content
quiz.explanation: Understanding search intent ensures your content matches what searchers actually want, improving ranking and user satisfaction.

quiz.question: Which of these is an important on-page SEO factor?
options: How often you change your website colors
The number of images you include regardless of relevance
Keyword placement in title tags, headings, and body content
Font size of all text
quiz.explanation: On-page optimization includes strategic keyword placement in titles, headings, and content that improves both user experience and search visibility.

quiz.question: What is a backlink, and what makes a backlink valuable for SEO?
options: A link from one page to another on the same website
A link from another website to your website, especially from authoritative sites
A link that you hide from users
Any link you pay for is automatically valuable
quiz.explanation: Backlinks from authoritative, relevant sites signal trust to search engines, improving your site's credibility and rankings.

modules.title: Social Media Marketing and Community Building
modules.description: Build engaged communities on social platforms, create viral content, and use social media strategically to drive business results.
objectives: Develop platform-specific social media strategies for different channels
Create engaging content that drives community interaction and growth
Manage social media communities and respond to audience feedback
Measure social media ROI and optimize campaigns based on data

lessons.title: Social Media Platforms: Strengths, Audiences, and Best Practices
lessons.description: Deep dive into Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, and emerging platforms.
objectives: Master platform-specific strategies

lessons.title: Creating Viral Content and Community Engagement
lessons.description: Learn content creation strategies that spark engagement, shares, and community growth.
objectives: Create engaging social content

lessons.title: Influencer Partnerships and Collaborative Growth
lessons.description: Understand influencer marketing, micro-influencers, and strategic partnerships for reach.
objectives: Build strategic influencer partnerships

lessons.title: Social Media Analytics and ROI Measurement
lessons.description: Track metrics that matter, measure campaign effectiveness, and optimize spending.
objectives: Measure and optimize social media performance

lessons.title: Module 3 Project: Complete Social Media Campaign
lessons.description: Plan and execute a 30-day social media campaign across multiple platforms with content calendar.
objectives: Launch and optimize social campaigns

quiz.question: What is the primary difference in how LinkedIn and Instagram audiences behave?
options: There is no difference; social media is all the same
LinkedIn audiences are primarily B2B/professional seeking information; Instagram audiences are lifestyle/visually-focused and seeking inspiration
LinkedIn is for older people only
Instagram is exclusively for entertainment
quiz.explanation: Platform audiences have distinct characteristics. LinkedIn users seek professional value; Instagram users seek visual inspiration and lifestyle content.

quiz.question: What metric matters most when measuring social media marketing ROI?
options: Number of followers (vanity metric)
Metrics tied to business goals: conversions, revenue, customer acquisition cost
Number of likes on every post
How viral content becomes
quiz.explanation: While followers and engagement matter, ROI is ultimately measured by business outcomes—leads generated, sales, and cost per acquisition.

quiz.question: Why do micro-influencers (10K-100K followers) often deliver better ROI than mega-influencers?
options: They don't; bigger is always better
Their audiences are often more engaged, authentic, and aligned with niche brands; they're more affordable
Micro-influencers only work for clothing brands
They don't require payment
quiz.explanation: Micro-influencers often have higher engagement rates, more targeted audiences, and are more cost-effective, delivering stronger results for niche brands.

modules.title: Email Marketing and Marketing Automation
modules.description: Master email as a powerful retention and conversion channel using segmentation, personalization, and automation workflows.
objectives: Build high-quality email lists through ethical lead generation
Design email campaigns with compelling copy and strategic calls-to-action
Implement marketing automation workflows for nurturing and conversion
Segment audiences and personalize communication at scale

lessons.title: Email Marketing Fundamentals: List Building and Compliance
lessons.description: Build compliant, high-quality email lists and understand email marketing best practices.
objectives: Build quality email lists ethically

lessons.title: Email Copy, Design, and Optimization
lessons.description: Write compelling subject lines, craft engaging email copy, and design responsive templates.
objectives: Create high-converting emails

lessons.title: Marketing Automation Workflows and Sequences
lessons.description: Set up automated email sequences for welcome, nurturing, and re-engagement campaigns.
objectives: Build automation workflows

lessons.title: Segmentation, Personalization, and Email Analytics
lessons.description: Segment your list, personalize communication, and analyze performance metrics.
objectives: Segment and personalize email campaigns

lessons.title: Module 4 Project: Welcome Email Sequence and Automation
lessons.description: Design and implement a welcome email series and automated nurture workflow.
objectives: Create complete email marketing systems

quiz.question: What is the ideal frequency for sending marketing emails?
options: Send multiple times daily to maximize exposure
Once a month to avoid overwhelming subscribers
Frequency depends on your audience, content, and testing results
Only send when you have something to sell
quiz.explanation: Email frequency should balance staying top-of-mind with avoiding unsubscribes. Test your audience's preferences.

quiz.question: What are the key metrics to track for email marketing success?
options: Only open rates matter
Open rate, click-through rate (CTR), conversion rate, unsubscribe rate, and ROI
Number of emails sent
How many people are on your list
quiz.explanation: Email success is measured by engagement (opens/clicks), conversions, and retention (unsubscribe rate), not just list size.

quiz.question: What is marketing automation's primary benefit?
options: It eliminates the need for human marketers
It allows you to deliver relevant messages at scale based on triggers and user behavior
It only works for large enterprise companies
It guarantees instant sales
quiz.explanation: Automation enables personalized, timely communication to many people based on their actions—efficient nurturing at scale.

modules.title: Paid Advertising and Analytics Excellence
modules.description: Master paid advertising platforms—Google Ads, Facebook Ads, LinkedIn—and use advanced analytics to optimize every campaign.
objectives: Plan and execute profitable paid advertising campaigns across platforms
Analyze campaign performance and optimize for maximum ROI
Understand advanced analytics and implement tracking systems
Design conversion optimization strategies and testing frameworks

lessons.title: Paid Advertising Fundamentals and Platform Overview
lessons.description: Understand advertising platforms (Google Ads, Facebook/Instagram Ads, LinkedIn) and their unique strengths.
objectives: Master advertising platforms

lessons.title: Google Ads: Search, Display, and Shopping Campaigns
lessons.description: Create profitable Google Ads campaigns across search, display, and shopping channels.
objectives: Manage Google Ads campaigns

lessons.title: Social Ads Mastery: Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn
lessons.description: Master social advertising with advanced targeting, creative optimization, and retargeting.
objectives: Execute social advertising campaigns

lessons.title: Analytics, Tracking, and Conversion Optimization
lessons.description: Implement comprehensive tracking, analyze performance, and optimize for conversions.
objectives: Set up complete tracking and optimization

lessons.title: Module 5 Project: Integrated Paid Advertising Campaign
lessons.description: Plan, launch, and optimize a multi-channel paid advertising campaign with tracking and ROI analysis.
objectives: Launch and optimize profitable campaigns

quiz.question: What is the primary advantage of Google Search Ads compared to Facebook Ads?
options: Google Ads are always cheaper
Google Search Ads reach people actively searching for your product; Facebook Ads reach based on interests
Google Ads are only for large companies
There is no difference between the platforms
quiz.explanation: Google captures demand (active searches); Facebook creates demand (interest-based targeting). Different goals require different platforms.

quiz.question: What is Cost Per Acquisition (CPA) and why does it matter more than Cost Per Click (CPC)?
options: CPA is the same as CPC
CPA measures the cost to acquire a customer; it's the true ROI metric, while CPC only measures clicks
CPA doesn't matter for advertising
Only large companies track CPA
quiz.explanation: CPA shows whether advertising is actually generating customers at a sustainable cost, not just traffic.

quiz.question: What is retargeting, and why is it valuable in paid advertising?
options: Advertising the same product multiple times on one platform
Showing ads to people who previously visited your site but didn't convert
Only purchasing ads without any tracking
Retargeting doesn't exist in modern advertising
quiz.explanation: Retargeting converts warm leads—people already interested—at lower costs, significantly improving overall advertising ROI.

bonusResources.title: Digital Marketing Toolkit
bonusResources.description: Collection of templates, checklists, and tools covering strategy, content, email, ads, and analytics

bonusResources.title: Case Studies from Real Campaigns
bonusResources.description: 10+ real digital marketing campaigns with strategies, results, and lessons learned

bonusResources.title: SEO Keyword Research Checklist
bonusResources.description: Step-by-step guide to conducting comprehensive keyword research and analyzing competitors

bonusResources.title: Email Template Library
bonusResources.description: 20+ professionally designed, responsive email templates ready to customize

bonusResources.title: Marketing Metrics Dashboard
bonusResources.description: Track KPIs across all marketing channels in one centralized dashboard

bonusResources.title: Tools Comparison Guide
bonusResources.description: Compare top marketing platforms for email, automation, analytics, and advertising
